acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A verified approved draft PR is promoted exactly once before merge
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Before the merge-capable role starts, Symphony replays the immutable readiness operation through game-api, requires its durable completed receipt, and re-fetches the normalized PR.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Restart after remote acceptance but before receipt recovers without duplicate mutation
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The recovery test preserves the deterministic operation ID and the runner-side authoritative replay relies on BOS idempotency, with no second provider mutation.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A stale HEAD blocks without promoting or merging
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Both the readiness operation and the fresh PR read are bound to the expected exact HEAD; invalid current state prevents deployment-verifier startup.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: The complete PR lifecycle reaches merge through bos-mcp only
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Symphony uses GameApi.Client exclusively for authoritative BOS readiness confirmation and normalized PR reads; it has no GitHub credentials or direct provider calls.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Complete Symphony tests and recovery gates pass
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The exact committed HEAD passed make all with 278 tests, 2 skipped, 100% coverage, Credo, specs, formatting, and Dialyzer.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Agent-writable handoff cannot bypass readiness confirmation
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: A new adversarial test supplies a fabricated matching confirmed JSON handoff; authoritative BOS rejection stops the flow and the deployment-verifier never starts.

checks.name: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test test/symphony_elixir/post_approval_coordinator_test.exs
checks.summary: 5 targeted tests passed, including fabricated-confirmation rejection and response-loss recovery.

checks.name: cd elixir && make all
checks.summary: 278 tests passed with 2 skipped; format, public specs, Credo, 100% coverage, and Dialyzer all passed on exact commit c3554e69d100bbf2a0fe5ec4badfbd8459138dc4.

summary: Workspace readiness JSON is now only a cache/intent. A durable BOS receipt and a fresh open, non-draft, exact-HEAD PR read are mandatory before the merge-capable role.
